It tastes delicious.

questions.passage: Ceviche is popular in Peru, but also in countries like Chile. It's easy to make. It's fish, but you don't cook it. You put some juice from a lemon on the fish and this 'cooks' it. Sometimes we eat it with onions and maybe some salad as well. Ceviche is rich in protein from the fish and vitamin C from the lemon juice.
